reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for the panel art and overlay bitmap text for floor result time, shard count, and rank letter after a clear event.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_shadow_rank_clear_panel_640x360.png through AssetServer during UI bootstrap and reveal it when the floor clear state fires.
runtime_notes: Frames represent S, A, B, and C rank variants with unique accent treatments.
Panel fades in over 0.6 seconds while the world camera remains fixed behind it.
Bitmap font overlays write the exact clear time and shard total into the reserved center columns.

context.usage: Centered clear panel that presents Shadow Rank, floor clear time, and shard results before the player advances or returns to menu.

shape.silhouette: Large centered plaque with rank crest area, timer strip, shard tally row, and two lower action button bays.

specs.texture: Dark lacquer body with gold trim, white text windows, and rank specific accent bands.
specs.shading: Flat panel body with bright crest highlights and a subtle teal or amber accent band by rank.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 2560x360 px with four 640x360 frames.
Rank crest area is at least 220x120 px and remains centered in every frame.
Lower action button bays each reserve a minimum 180x48 px clickable art area for Next Floor and Menu options.
